leadText: The Rainbow Flower (Japanese: にじいろのはな Rainbow Flower) is a Key Item introduced in Generation VII. It is one of the items the player collects during Mina's trial in Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Starts the final part of Mina 's trial, a battle with Totem Ribombee .

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method US UM Seafolk Village (during Mina 's trial, from Mina after collecting all seven petals)

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A flower made of the petals you received from captains. It's proof that your growth has been recognized by them.

sections.title: In the core series games

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A flower made of the petals you received from captains. It's proof that your growth has been recognized by them. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method US UM Seafolk Village (during Mina 's trial, from Mina after collecting all seven petals)
